sentences.translation: Nastupio je Kurban-bajram i svi su se obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: Eid Al-Adha came and everyone was happy.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَذَهَبُوا إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su obukla novu odjeću i otišla na namaz.
sentences.translationEn: The children wore new clothes and went to the prayer.

sentences.arabic: صَلَّتِ الْعَائِلَةُ صَلَاةَ الْعِيدِ مَعَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je klanjala bajram-namaz sa muslimanima.
sentences.translationEn: The family prayed the Eid prayer with the Muslims.

sentences.translation: Posjećivali su jedni druge sa komšijama i čestitali.
sentences.translationEn: They visited each other with neighbors and exchanged congratulations.
